name: Kawasaki & Co., Ltd.
summary: Kawasaki & Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells clothing products under the Lake Ulster brand. The company offers towels, handkerchiefs, bags, pouches, accessories, interior items, bath toiletries, and other items. It is also involved in the rental and leasing of warehouses, as well as photovoltaic power generation and other businesses. The company sells its products through retail and department stores; and directly operated stores. Kawasaki & Co., Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
